Nehemiah, having finished the wall, returned to the Persian court and came to Jerusalem again with a new commission. The public safety depends on everyone's care to guard yourself and your family against sin.

Nehemiah knew that the safety of a city, under God, depends more upon its inhabitants than upon its walls. Every good gift and every good work are from above. God gives knowledge; he gives grace; all is of him, and therefore all must be to him. What is done by human prudence must be ascribed to the direction of Divine Providence. But woe to those who turn back from the Lord, loving this present world! And happy those who dedicate themselves and their substance to his service and glory!
